name: Devil's Luck
description: Landing on 0 pays out 5× instead of nothing.
flavor: The house always wins… except when he doesn't.

name: Red Blessing
description: Winning on red adds +50 bonus chips.
flavor: The colour of luck, of fire, of fortune.

name: Black Market
description: Winning on black adds +50 bonus chips.
flavor: What happens in the dark stays in the profit.

name: Grim Refund
description: On a total loss, recover 30% of wagered chips.

name: Straight Razor
description: Straight-up wins score 2× toward the target.
flavor: A precise cut earns a precise reward.

name: The Grind
description: Every spin counts double toward the score target.
flavor: Slow and steady buries the house.

name: Loaded Pockets
description: Start each floor with +75 extra chips.

name: Column of Smoke
flavor: They never see the column coming.

name: Dozen Roses
flavor: A gift from the Devil's garden.

name: High Roller
description: Any win above 200 chips is multiplied by 1.5×.

name: Soul Chip
description: Once per run, if you would go bust, survive with 10 chips.
flavor: One last piece of yourself, wagered.

name: Mirror Bet
description: When you win on Even, you also win as if you bet Odd (same stake).

name: Haunted Zero
description: Each time 0 lands, a persistent +10 chip bonus is added to all future wins this run.

name: Crimson Dozen
description: Winning with a bet that covers only red numbers pays +100 bonus.
flavor: Red runs deep in this place.
